howToUse: Read this file + the in_progress phase file(s) each session. Statuses: pending | in_progress | done. Keep statuses and notes current — this plan is the source of truth, not chat history.
roadmapNote: Phases 0–9 shipped the original editor + 0.2.0 beta release. Phases 10–13 are the 'compete with CleanShot X' chapter, sequenced interleaved per the user: worst editor bugs first (10), then the menu-bar/capture/recording features (11–12), then remaining polish + video editing (13). Post-1.0 candidate list lives in backlog.md.

phases.title: Infrastructure: repo, CI, site, release pipeline
Canvas & viewport: Metal-backed view, zoom/pan, selection
Annotations & text: arrows, shapes, highlights, text blocks
Transform tools: crop UI, resize, skew
Layers UX: panel, promote-to-layer, effects, persistence
Polish: liquid glass everywhere, animations, signing, perf pass
Screenshot capture & history (user request; preempts phase 2 remainder)
Critical editor fixes: undo/redo, arrow redesign, annotation-shadow bug
Menu-bar app & capture overrides (tray, ⌘⇧3/⌘⇧4, slide-down history, edit round-trip)
Screen recording (⌘⇧5): region/full, audio device, floating stop, into history
Editor polish + video: text font/scale, color picker + MRU, playback/trim/crop, MP4/GIF export
